# Lily — Plant Care App

> Smart reminders, AI diagnosis, and care schedules personalized to every plant in your home.

Lily is a mobile app (iOS and Android) that helps plant owners keep their plants alive with personalized care reminders, AI-powered plant identification and disease diagnosis, care logging, and community features.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://withlily.app/en): Product overview, features, pricing, and FAQ
- [Blog](https://withlily.app/en/blog): Plant care guides, tips, and troubleshooting
- [Privacy Policy](https://withlily.app/en/privacy): How we handle user data
- [Terms of Service](https://withlily.app/en/terms): Usage terms

## Features

- Plant collection management with photos and health tracking
- Personalized watering, fertilizing, and misting reminders
- AI-powered plant identification from photos
- AI chat for plant care advice and disease diagnosis
- Care action logging and history
- Room-based plant organization
- Community sharing and badges
- 7-day free trial, then $4.99/month or $29.99/year

## Download

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/lily-plant-care/id6504462690
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lilyapp.plants
